svg.text: Arduino Nano ESP32 · DS18B20 ×2 · GPS · FrSky X8R · SD Card · Servos ×2 · 12V→5V Buck
• All 5V loads (GPS, RF, SD, Servos) run from buck converter output
• Arduino logic runs at 3.3V; sensors powered from onboard 3.3V reg
• Fuse protects entire circuit; switch interrupts 12V before buck input
D3=GPS RX · D4=GPS TX · D6=RF CH · D8=Servo2 · D9=Servo1
D10=SD CS · D11=SD MOSI · D12=SD MISO · D13=SD SCK
